message:
fix(frankensqlite): implement proper close_sync for FrankenConnection

Add close_inner() helper that uses Arc::try_unwrap to take sole
ownership of the underlying connection before calling conn.close(),
returning a Disconnected error with the reference count if other
strong references still exist. Wire close_sync() into the Connection
trait's close() method, replacing the previous no-op that silently
dropped the connection and relied on Drop for cleanup.

Includes a unit test verifying close_sync succeeds on an in-memory DB.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
